summary: Phase 2 AI Trade Consultation Integration - All 20 tests passed. Full consultation endpoint wired into trading bot decision flow with debate, risk, institutional, and volume analysis.

consultation_status_api.details: Returns consultation service status with enabled=true, modules_available (debate, risk_manager, institutional_flow, volume_anomaly), modules_enabled, shadow_mode

consultation_run_api.details: Runs full consultation with all 4 modules. Returns proceed (bool), size_adjustment (0-1.0), reasoning (combined signals), debate_result, risk_assessment, institutional_context, volume_context, shadow_logged, shadow_decision_id

details: Debate module: Returns winner (bull/bear/tie), final_recommendation (proceed/pass/reduce_size), confidence
Risk Manager: Returns risk_level (low/moderate/high/extreme), total_risk_score, recommendation
Volume Analysis: Returns signals, profile with rvol, zscore, volume_trend

shadow_decision_logging.details: Consultation logs decision to Shadow Tracker. shadow_logged=true, shadow_decision_id returned. Decision count increased from 21 to 22+ during testing

size_adjustment_recommendations.details: size_adjustment returned in range 0-1.0 (tested: 1.0 for favorable trades). Used by trading bot to reduce position size when AI recommends

proceed_pass_recommendations.details: proceed boolean returned correctly. When modules block, proceed=false and trading bot skips trade

details: Trading bot can BLOCK trades if AI rejects (lines 1976-1985)
Trading bot can REDUCE SIZE based on AI recommendation (lines 1988-1994)
Shadow decision ID tracked for outcome learning

critical_code_review_comments: AI Consultation properly wired into trading bot via set_ai_consultation method in server.py line 805
Trading bot _evaluate_opportunity method calls consult_on_trade before execution
Shadow Mode active - AI analyzes and logs but doesn't block trades (learning mode)
All 4 modules (debate, risk_manager, institutional_flow, volume_anomaly) integrated into consultation
Size adjustment and proceed/pass recommendations flow correctly from AI to trading bot
Consultation endpoint handles minimal trade objects gracefully with defaults

mocked_apis_list: Institutional ownership returns placeholder data pending full SEC EDGAR parsing (as documented by main agent)
mocked_apis.note: All other APIs return real computed results - debate, risk assessment, volume analysis all functional

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 AI Consultation fully tested. New endpoints: GET /api/ai-modules/consultation/status, POST /api/ai-modules/consultation/run. Trading bot integration verified - AI consultation wired in _evaluate_opportunity method. All 4 modules (debate, risk, institutional, volume) run during consultation. Shadow Mode logs all decisions to Shadow Tracker. Previous Phase 1 endpoints all backward compatible.
